properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v2 v3 v3 v3 v2 v2 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is nothing worth more That will ever come close No thing can compare You're our living hope Your presence Lord I've tasted and seen Of the sweetest of love When my heart becomes free And my shame is undone Your presence Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Holy spirit, You are welcome here Come flood this place and fill the atmosphere Your glory, God, is what our hearts long for To be overcome by Your presence, Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let us become more aware of Your presence Let us experience the glory of Your goodness

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Holy Spirit Come rest on us You're all we want
